close_reason: Implemented mtime-based staleness detection for tk rules sync. Files where rules.star is newer than all source files are skipped. Added --force/-f and --all/-a flags to bypass staleness detection when needed.
description: Three-tier staleness check: (1) git status for changed files, (2) mtime comparison, (3) content hash. Store hash in rules.star header comment. Scope extraction to only changed files for performance.
title: Implement staleness detection optimization
